description: The digital marketing team needs to access Socioboard via the internal domain name `http://social.agency.local` rather than `localhost`. Configure the system and Apache to serve the Socioboard application (located at `/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public`) at this domain. Ensure the system's hosts file, the Apache virtual host configuration at `/etc/apache2/sites-available/social-agency.conf`, and the Socioboard environment file at `/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/.env` are all updated to support the new domain. Verify the setup by loading `http://social.agency.local` in Firefox.
